name: institute_website
description: GitHub Pages website for public Active Inference Institute information.

scripts.check: node --check src/build.mjs && python3 -m py_compile scripts/check_internal_links.py scripts/check_live_sources.py scripts/check_site_contract.py scripts/check_static_security.py scripts/sync_instituteos_public_data.py && npm run check:links && npm run check:instituteos && npm run check:design-system && npm run check:site && npm run check:security
